overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The journey begins under an elevated highway, transitions through narrow steamy back alleys with graffiti, opens into bustling plazas with holographic advertisements, and continues through covered market walkways filled with vendors and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with vehicle crossing

events.description: moves from under the highway overpass into a narrow alley entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow striped crosswalk under the overpass, avoiding passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving across the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines
massive cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overhead highway
metal security fence running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive elevated highway overpass at night. The camera follows the character across a broad yellow-striped crosswalk as cars pass by. Concrete support pillars line the path, and a chain-link fence runs along the right side as the character approaches a narrow alley entrance bathed in bright light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with steam vents and graffiti

events.description: steam vents release white vapor into the alley, partially obscuring the path ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alleyway, passing dumpsters and steam vents

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead in the steamy alley

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
industrial pipe releasing white steam into the alley
large industrial waste container with open lid
network of metal pipes and conduits running along the alley ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed back alley flanked by graffiti-covered concrete walls and industrial infrastructure. Steam vents release plumes of white vapor that drift across the path. Green dumpsters and debris line the sides as the character follows a distant figure deeper into the alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance alley with neon signage

events.description: exits the narrow alley into a wider street with tall buildings and neon signs

agents.ego_description: following the blue-haired character past the hotel entrance and turning left into the open street

notable_agents.action: blue-haired character in white and orange outfit walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: bright blue neon sign with Japanese characters ホテル and English HOTEL
covered entrance with pink neon lighting and concrete awning
futuristic elevated train track structure running alongside the street
high-rise residential towers with balconies and external piping

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wider street dominated by a hotel entrance with bright blue and pink neon signage. Following a blue-haired character, the camera passes under the hotel canopy and turns left, revealing towering cyberpunk residential buildings and an elevated monorail track against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: character turns left to navigate around a group of pedestrians
crowd density increases significantly as the character enters the main plaza area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded plaza, turning left and weaving between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and vest standing with arms crossed near a storefront

entered.detail: large floating holographic display showing pink neon graphics
wide open area with scattered debris and multiple pedestrian paths
commercial building with large glass windows and illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling open plaza filled with dense crowds of pedestrians. Holographic advertisements float above the street, casting pink and blue light onto the scene. The character turns left to navigate around groups of people, passing by glass storefronts and tall residential towers while steam rises from vents in the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with overhead lighting

events.description: enters the covered market area with metal canopy overhead

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered market walkway, passing under the metal canopy structure

entered.detail: metal and glass roof structure covering the walkway
long rectangular LED light strips illuminating the path
food vendor stall with illuminated menu and serving counter
black metal framework supporting the market roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered market walkway protected by a metal and glass canopy overhead. Fluorescent light fixtures illuminate the tiled path as market stalls line both sides. The crowd density remains moderate with people browsing the vendor stalls as the character moves deeper into the market structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: market food court with outdoor stalls

events.description: exits the covered market back into the open street with food carts

agents.ego_description: passing through the market exit back into the open street, passing food vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor working at the Combat Cab food stall serving customers

entered.detail: brightly lit food stall with red signage and menu displaying COMBAT CAB
multiple food carts with yellow canopies and steam rising from grills
yellow-roofed street food vendor cart with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered market into an open street lined with food stalls. The Combat Cab food stall stands prominently on the left with bright red signage, while yellow food carts line the right side of the street. Steam rises from the cooking grills as pedestrians continue browsing the vendors in the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the industrial shadows of a highway overpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a bustling cyberpunk district. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, crossing a yellow-striped street before narrowing into a dim back alley filled with graffiti and drifting plumes of white steam. As the character emerges from the alley, the environment opens up into a bright street dominated by blue and pink neon hotel signage and towering residential blocks under an elevated monorail. The scene then expands into a crowded open plaza where holographic advertisements cast colorful light over pedestrians, before shifting into a covered market walkway illuminated by fluorescent fixtures and lined with vendor stalls. Finally, the camera exits the canopy into an open street filled with steaming food carts and bright red signage, completing the transition into the dense urban nightlife.
